name: ground_truth_sc28_encryption_at_rest_compliant
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 292, CCI-001199, assessed 2026-05-27). Compliant verdict based on encryption-at-rest review across on-prem and cloud scopes. Narrative uses structured On-prem/Cloud headings with 'Reviewed' and 'confirmed' affirming phrases, and cites a USD-numbered architecture document. Evidence type: architecture document + FIPS crypto modules. Tests dual-scope (on-prem + cloud) narrative acceptance and USD citation parsing.

ccis_row.guidance: 001199: The information system protects the confidentiality and/or integrity of organization-defined information at rest.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment examines the information system to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed configures the information system to protect the confidentiality and/or integrity of organization-defined information at rest.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- USD00050014 Rev D Cybersecurity Architecture — sections on Encryption of Data at Rest (DAR) and Encrypted Data Storage Service.
- NAS encryption verification — on-prem storage encryption status using FIPS-certified cryptographic modules.
- Cloud storage configuration — S3 bucket encryption settings and SIEM archive retention policy.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative:
On-prem:
Examined USD00050014 Rev D "Encryption of Data at Rest (DAR)" / "Encrypted Data Storage Service"; confirmed via the NAS encryption configuration that on-premise NAS encrypts stored data using FIPS-certified cryptographic modules.

Cloud (AWS GovCloud):
Examined USD00050014 Rev D "Encryption of Data at Rest (DAR)" / "Encrypted Data Storage Service"; confirmed via cloud storage bucket settings that buckets are used for data-at-rest with encryption enabled. SIEM archives older than 120 days are also stored in encrypted cloud storage.
